title: Current test suite fails in ecp5 tests on mux.ys
body:
```
Merge: f8d5920a c5d28f5d
Author: Miodrag Milanović <mmicko@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun Jan 5 20:21:04 2020 +0100
```

```
Running mul.ys..
Running mux.ys..
ERROR: Assertion failed: selection contains 8 elements instead of the asserted 12: t:L6MUX21
Selection contains:
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D1_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z_D0_PFUMX_Z_ALUT_LUT4_Z_D_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z_D0_PFUMX_Z_ALUT_LUT4_Z_C_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z_D0_PFUMX_Z_ALUT_LUT4_Z_C_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z_D0_PFUMX_Z_ALUT_LUT4_Z_C_L6MUX21_Z_D1_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z_D1_PFUMX_Z_C0_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z_D0_L6MUX21_Z
mux16/Y_L6MUX21_Z
make[1]: *** [run-mux.ys] Error 1
run-test.mk:52: recipe for target 'run-mux.ys' failed
make[1]: Leaving directory '$SRC_DIR/tests/arch/ecp5'
make: *** [test] Error 2
```
